title: Code review risk assessor
job: Reviews a patch for correctness, security, and test gaps.
rule: Findings must reference file paths or patch hunks when possible.
samplePrompt: Review the current code review risk assessor queue and write a prioritized action report.

liveIntegrations.openrouter: Model inference through @eve-catalog/openrouter when OPENROUTER_API_KEY is configured.
liveIntegrations.superserve: Sandbox execution through @eve-catalog/superserve-backend when SUPERSERVE_API_KEY is configured.
liveIntegrations.monid: Optional live tool discovery/run when MONID_API_KEY is valid.
